description: Lock the 2026-07-03 galleon correction to hull, rig, caravel/carrack lineage, and broadside gun-platform design rather than generic navigation/cartography context.

checks.reason: Broadside artillery shaped the galleon's lower, gun-port warship architecture while the hull type also served cargo roles.
The Mariners' Museum and reviewed summaries trace galleons from caravel and carrack design traditions.
Cartography supports navigation and deployment, not the direct hull, rig, and gun-platform design of galleons.
